title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Future Retail Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Future Retail Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail Capital India:
Future Retail Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail Capital India!
